title: Automate & mirror subitems
excerpt: I currently have an automation to create an item and mirror columns on a separate board based on a status change. This works with main items but does not work properly with subitems. Improving this feature to work with s…

posts.author: mfcu_amsmith (Anna Smith)
posts.cookedHtml: I currently have an automation to create an item and mirror columns on a separate board based on a status change. This works with main items but does not work properly with subitems. Improving this feature to work with subitems would allow for improved efficiency and automation.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @mfcu_amsmith,

We’ve developed an app called Connected Boards Automations. Which allows to run robust automations on connected boards column, and also supports subitems. Here are two examples of how it can be used in this case →

As long as the subitem and item are connected via connected boards. You can

Sync values →

Screenshot 2025-02-05 at 13.04.252208×562 39.9 KB

Copy values →

Screenshot 2025-02-05 at 13.05.262240×600 36.8 KB

You can find it in the monday.com app marketplace in the platform or here - https://monday.com/marketplace/listing/10000321/connected-boards-automations-

Hope that helps!
